jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - CaratLane - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, CaratLane in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CaratLane:
CaratLane is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
